de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.JavaBlock

Packages that use JavaBlock
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.nodeviews
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
provides a representation for the term structure.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.equality
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op
contains the operators of JTerms.
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp
This package contains pretty-printing functionality used by the GUI and for saving proofs.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init
This package contains classes handling prover initialisation.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
This package contains classes for implementing rules.
de.uka.ilkd.key.testgen
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule

    Method

    static JavaBlock
    MergeRuleUtils.getJavaBlockRecursive(JTerm term)
    Returns the first Java block in the given term that can be found by recursive search, or the empty block if there is no non-empty Java block in the term.
